commit_scope: Add a bounded optimizer-step math floor.

commands: coord claim optimizer-step-math-floor "Next model-kernel/data wall: add bounded optimizer-step math receipt over integer vectors; avoid live mesh transport, durable eval query, payload merkle proof, privacy/conflict, router/audio, and BML compiler lanes."
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/model-vitality.fk form-stdlib/optimizer-step.fk form-stdlib/tests/optimizer-step-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Focused validate returned `core.fk+model-vitality.fk+optimizer-step.fk+optimizer-step-band.fk -> 4095` with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`. The fourth-arm gate returned `PASS-4WAY  optimizer-step`. An initial invalid-input proof crashed sibling kernels on divide-by-zero; the receipt was made total by refusing invalid scale/length before computing after-vectors. Wellness reported no attention items; it also observed production deploy lagged one commit behind origin/main at that moment.

ci_validation.notes: No push or PR yet for this lane.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested; this is a local Form runtime floor.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form-native model kernels now have a bounded fixed-point SGD and momentum optimizer-step receipt over small integer vectors.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/model-vitality.fk form-stdlib/optimizer-step.fk form-stdlib/tests/optimizer-step-band.fk

phase_gate.gate: A small deterministic optimizer step must exist before autodiff/Adam/live training loops can claim first-class Form-native model-kernel status.
phase_gate.next: Add autodiff gradient cells, Adam optimizer cells, live chunk payload merkle proof, mesh transport, durable eval query, and privacy/conflict receipts as separate bounded lanes.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: Optimizer-state delta slices were shareable receipts, while optimizer-step math remained a named next wall.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: optimizer-step returns 4095 four-way and is admitted to form/fourth-arm-bands.txt.
not_claimed: chunk-range payload merkle proof over a live carrier
